retrieved_result: Skyrim:Blacksmith This article is about blacksmiths in general. For the classes, see Blacksmith (class). For the skill, see Smithing. Blacksmiths are various merchants scattered throughout Skyrim. They are often found at or near smithing equipment, and sell a wide variety of weapons, armor and smithing equipment, inc
